content.text:
**Recent Top Posts on Solana AI Agents, Trading Bots, Solana DeFi, Blockchain AI Agents, and Crypto Trading Bots (English, as of Feb 5, 2026):**

Solana is exploding with AI agent activity, particularly autonomous trading bots and DeFi tools. Official Solana accounts highlight agents "loose onchain," listing projects like Moltbot (OpenClaw), SolSkill for DeFi swaps/lending, AgentPad launchpads, and infra like confidential VMs.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2018920649935192139)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2019039398030082468)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018420233552175420)

**Key Highlights:**
- **Agent Hackathon by Solana & Colosseum**: $100K prizes for top AI agents building on Solana. Agents register and compete; direct OpenClaw agents to participate.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2018420230427496753)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018420233552175420)
- **Trading Bots & Agents**:
  - @apexflowagent: Autonomous on-chain strategist turning natural language into trades.[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2018257305641329128)
  - $MOLTIMUS: Open-source AI agent for Solana memecoins via Axiom, with wallet monitoring, auto-trades, stop-loss.[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2017401414784336207)
  - Nosyt Labs: Production Solana trading agent managing $100K+ autonomously.[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2018900834881343851)
  - MoltBot: AI trading strategies boosting ROI by 15% on Solana.[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2018728741208203512)
- **DeFi & Agent Tools**:
  - SolSkillClaw: Agent-native API for Jupiter swaps, Kamino yields, Raydium pools—self-custodial.[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2019039398030082468)
  - Bankr (@bankrbot): Agents deploy coins on Raydium bonding curves, earn fees.[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2018227836163944686)
  - AgentPad (@Agentpad_Solana): Autonomous token launchpad for agents to earn trading fees—no humans needed.[[10]](https://x.com/i/status/2019011549562536211)[[11]](https://x.com/i/status/2019011559985430685)
  - @agentincdotfun: Tokenized AI agent "startups" as mini-CEOs on BagsApp.[[12]](https://x.com/i/status/2018221083166711986)
- **Other Notables**: Cobot Arc for privacy-preserving prediction markets & agents; SQD Cloud for Solana DeFi analytics fed to agents; Clawpump launchpad.[[13]](https://x.com/i/status/2018399452277702708)[[14]](https://x.com/i/status/2019108221215207904)

Solana's ecosystem is positioning as the go-to for on-chain AI agents in trading/DeFi, with hackathons and tools accelerating adoption. Check Solana's weekly recap for broader context.[[15]](https://x.com/i/status/2017976236811956603) For latest, monitor @solana, @OpenClaw, @colosseum. DYOR! 🚀
